events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: EMT bending & installation, unreamed cut ends. Rough-complete. Condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail because non-compliant and hazard (sharp edges damage conductors). Risk medium/high? Unreamed EMT ends can abrade conductors, code violation. Commercial project, third-party inspections. Risk maybe medium? Could cause insulation damage, short, fire. Let's assess. NEC 358.28 requires all cut ends of EMT to be reamed or otherwise finished to remove rough edges. Defective condition. Decision fail. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 75? Value not asked 0. Sound etc default 0/empty. Findings: EMT cut ends left unreamed with burrs/rough edges; conductors may be damaged during pull; violates NEC 358.28. Actions: Remove/rework unreamed ends, ream all cut ends smooth, inspect before wire pull. Rationale. References: NEC 358.28, maybe Ch.9 fill not relevant. Need JSON valid. Ensure no prose outside.
